title: Enforce Formatting And Import Hygiene
forbids: workspace manifest ordering drift, formatter drift, ordinary lint hygiene violations, and import-organization drift
why: sort-package-json owns package manifest ordering and Biome owns formatter, ordinary hygiene, and import-organization checks; Habitat routes that native gate without duplicating either authority.
message: Run `bun run format`; keep workspace manifests canonically ordered and external, vendored, and generated surfaces excluded from native Biome coverage.
